pr.title: Crystal Curriculum — TF-IDF curriculum learning by Bee Bytez

output.summary: TF-IDF Crystallizer oversamples candidate batches, decays from dense curriculum to uniform, and pairs Muon weight decay with a 10-layer transformer.
techniques: TF-IDF Crystallizer scores 4 batch candidates by information density each step
Curriculum favors dense data until 70% of training then decays to uniform sampling
Muon weight decay plus an extra transformer layer to support compression
